# UtilityHub

> Privacy-first browser-based utility tools, AI prompt tools, developer workflow helpers, and local review utilities.

UtilityHub provides local, client-side tools for formatting, encoding, security review, AI prompt design, eval preparation, API inspection, diff review, file-fixture generation, and delivery workflow checks.

## Canonical references

- Site: https://utilityhub.dev/
- Sitemap: https://utilityhub.dev/sitemap.xml
- Machine-readable catalog: https://utilityhub.dev/tool-catalog.json
- Collections index: https://utilityhub.dev/collections
- Guides index: https://utilityhub.dev/guides

## Privacy model

- Tools are designed to run in the browser.
- Pasted data should remain local to the page for normal use.
- Good fit for transforming snippets, configs, request payloads, response headers, AI prompts, text diffs, fixture files, and docs fragments.

## Search keywords

- Privacy-first developer tools
- Browser-based utilities
- AI utility tools
- LLM prompt tools
- Prompt testing tools
- JSON formatter
- Markdown formatter
- Diff checker
- Base64 encoder
- JWT decoder
- OpenAPI tools
- Developer workflow tools

## Collections

- /collections/web-designers: curated browser-local workflows for visual design and asset prep.
- /collections/web-developers: curated workflows for everyday web implementation and request shaping.
- /collections/frontend-developers: curated utilities for UI implementation, formatting, and browser-facing checks.
- /collections/backend-developers: curated utilities for API contracts, signing, payloads, and headers.
- /collections/civil-construction: curated utilities for handover notes, earthworks, and level checks.
- /collections/mechanical-manufacturing: curated utilities for bearings, drives, ratios, and quick machine checks.
- /collections/electrical-power: curated utilities for voltage drop, cable sizing, conduit fill, panel schedules, and formula lookup.
- /collections/medical-clinical: curated utilities for shift handover, note cleanup, and care-team workflow support.
- /collections/mining-resources: curated utilities for site handover, production notes, and field-level tracking.
- /collections/business-analysts: curated utilities for structured notes, tables, comparisons, and summaries.
- /collections/manual-testers: curated utilities for QA evidence, fixtures, and response inspection.
- /collections/automation-testers: curated utilities for regex, payload paths, CI checks, and test data.
- /collections/performance-testers: curated utilities for timing, size, logs, and result shaping.
- /collections/load-stress-testers: curated utilities for capacity review, timing math, and run summaries.
- /collections/penetration-testers: curated utilities for token, policy, redirect, and security-text review.
- /collections/devops-engineers: curated utilities for Docker, workflow YAML, cron, env, and delivery hygiene.
- /collections/secops-engineers: curated utilities for secret handling, policy checks, and auth-adjacent review.
- /collections/ai-engineers: curated utilities for prompts, evals, schema testing, and AI safety workflows.
- /collections/product-owners: curated utilities for release notes, diffs, tables, and planning artifacts.
- /collections/scrum-masters: curated utilities for checklists, timing cleanup, and delivery communication.
- /collections/data-engineers-and-analysts: curated utilities for CSV, JSON, JSONL, SQL, and reporting transforms.

## Tool catalog

Every cataloged tool has a matching guide at `/guides/{tool-id}`.

- /json-formatter: Validate, prettify, and minify JSON locally.
- /base64-studio: Encode or decode Base64 text payloads.
- /hash-generator: Generate MD5, SHA-256, and SHA-512 digests.
- /password-generator: Generate strong local passwords with adjustable options.
- /url-encoder: Encode or decode URL-safe strings.
- /case-converter: Convert text into common naming conventions.
- /timestamp-converter: Convert Unix timestamps into local and ISO dates.
- /jwt-decoder: Decode JWT headers and payloads locally.
- /regex-tester: Test JavaScript regex patterns with highlighted matches.
- /qr-code-generator: Generate downloadable QR codes from text or links.
- /uuid-generator: Generate UUID batches locally.
- /ulid-generator: Generate sortable ULIDs locally.
- /hmac-generator: Generate SHA-256 and SHA-512 HMAC signatures.
- /query-string-studio: Round-trip JSON objects and query strings.
- /html-entity-studio: Encode or decode HTML entities.
- /hex-studio: Encode text to hex or decode hex into text.
- /slugify-studio: Produce URL-friendly slugs and path-safe variants.
- /unicode-escape-studio: Encode text as unicode escape sequences and decode back.
- /csv-json-studio: Convert CSV rows and JSON arrays.
- /text-diff-checker: Compare two text blocks in a side-by-side review layout.
- /docker-optimizer: Review Dockerfiles for repeatability and runtime hygiene.
- /video-to-gif-studio: Convert local videos into GIFs with trim, FPS, scale, and color controls for pull request sharing.
- /github-actions-validator: Review GitHub Actions workflow structure and CI safety signals.
- /dependency-visualizer: Summarize package manifests and grouped dependencies.
- /bundle-size-calculator: Estimate bundle totals and asset mix from pasted build output.
- /curl-to-code-converter: Convert cURL commands into fetch, axios, and Python starter snippets.
- /sql-beautifier: Format dense SQL into a reviewable layout.
- /semantic-version-calculator: Estimate patch, minor, and major version bumps from change notes.
- /breaking-change-detector: Compare JSON shapes for removed fields and type shifts.
- /http-header-inspector: Review raw response headers for security, cache, and CORS gaps.
- /cron-expression-explainer: Explain five-part cron schedules and preview next runs.
- /docker-compose-auditor: Inspect docker-compose service definitions for health and image hygiene.
- /openapi-summary: Summarize OpenAPI paths, operations, tags, and security schemes.
- /markdown-table-builder: Convert CSV rows or JSON arrays into markdown tables.
- /json-schema-generator: Infer draft JSON Schema from sample JSON.
